pages.title: Dex
pages.content:
# Dex

> Dex is a personal CRM that helps you consolidate, organize, and nurture your relationships. Import contacts from LinkedIn, email, WhatsApp, and more into one place. Set keep-in-touch reminders, take notes, and never forget where you left off.

Dex is built for people, not sales pipelines. Unlike traditional CRMs (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive), Dex is designed for personal relationship management — intuitive, fast, and privacy-first. Supported by subscriptions, not ads. Your data is never sold or shared.

- Founded: 2019
- Operator: Dana HQ Inc.
- Users: 30,000+
- Contact: contact@getdex.com

## Product

- [Product Overview](https://getdex.com/product): The Rolodex, reimagined. Keep-in-touch reminders, notes, unified timeline, and smart notifications across all your contacts.
- [Mobile App](https://getdex.com/mobile): iOS and Android app for managing relationships on the go.
- [Desktop App](https://getdex.com/desktop): Mac and Windows desktop app.
- [Browser Extension](https://getdex.com/browser-extension): Chrome extension for one-click access from LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and more.

## Use Cases

- [Personal CRM for MBA Students](https://getdex.com/product/mba): Build and maintain your network throughout business school.
- [Personal CRM for Founders](https://getdex.com/product/founders): Manage investor, partner, and customer relationships.
- [Personal CRM for Investors](https://getdex.com/product/investors): Track deal flow and portfolio relationships.
- [Personal CRM for Job Seekers](https://getdex.com/product/jobseekers): Organize your job search networking.
- [Personal CRM for Creators](https://getdex.com/product/creators): Manage collaborations and audience relationships.

## Integrations

- [Integrations Overview](https://getdex.com/integrations): Connect your favorite tools with Dex to manage relationships seamlessly.
- [Gmail](https://getdex.com/integrations/gmail): Sync email conversations and track interaction timelines.
- [Google Calendar](https://getdex.com/integrations/google-calendar): View meetings, event history, and add meeting notes.
- [LinkedIn](https://getdex.com/integrations/linkedin): Sync connections, track title changes, and get network updates.
- [WhatsApp](https://getdex.com/integrations/whatsapp): Import contacts from 1:1 chats and sync interactions.
- [iMessage](https://getdex.com/integrations/imessage): Sync iMessage activity with automatic name enrichment.
- [Facebook](https://getdex.com/integrations/facebook): Import friends, profile photos, and birthdays.
- [Instagram](https://getdex.com/integrations/instagram): Sync 1:1 DMs and timeline updates.
- [Superhuman](https://getdex.com/integrations/superhuman): Quick integration from the Superhuman email client.
- [Two-Way Contact Sync](https://getdex.com/integrations/two-way-sync): Keep device contacts and Dex contacts synchronized.
- [Zapier](https://getdex.com/integrations/zapier): Create contacts, notes, and reminders via no-code automation.
- [CSV Import](https://getdex.com/integrations/csv): Bulk import from Airtable, Outlook, Notion, Google Contacts, and more.
- [ChatGPT App](https://chatgpt.com/apps/dex/asdk_app_69a79848c5708191b157a64ff93bc799): Dex as a native ChatGPT app — manage your CRM directly in ChatGPT.

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://getdex.com/pricing): 7-day free trial available.
 - **Premium**: $12/mo (annual), $16/mo (quarterly), $20/mo (monthly). Includes mobile, extension, web, desktop access, LinkedIn sync (2,500 connections), Map View, WhatsApp & messaging sync, email & calendar integrations, two-way contact sync, custom fields, and contact import.
 - **Professional**: $20/mo (annual), $27/mo (quarterly), $34/mo (monthly). All Premium features plus LinkedIn sync (9,000 connections), mail merge, Outlook integration, multiple email account sync, API/Zapier access, and priority support.

## Guides

- [MBA Networking Guide](https://getdex.com/guides/mba-networking): Comprehensive guide to networking for MBA students.
- [Best Personal CRM](https://getdex.com/guides/best-personal-crm): Comparison guide for choosing a personal CRM.
- [Organizing Your Job Search](https://getdex.com/guides/organizing-job-search): How to organize networking during a job search.
- [History of CRM](https://getdex.com/guides/history-of-crm): The evolution of customer relationship management.
- [Networking for College Students](https://getdex.com/guides/networking-college-students): Networking tips for college students.

## Security & Privacy

- [Security](https://getdex.com/security): SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certified. HTTPS/TLS encryption for data-in-transit, AES256 encryption for data-at-rest. All servers hosted in the US. Users can export or delete data at any time.

## Company

- [About](https://getdex.com/about): Founded in 2019 because existing tools like spreadsheets and Airtable were too manual for managing relationships.
- [Ambassador Program](https://getdex.com/ambassador): Join the Dex Ambassador Program.
- [Documentation](https://guide.getdex.com): Help center and getting started guides.
- [Privacy Policy](https://getdex.com/privacypolicy): Privacy policy (last updated Jan 27, 2022).
- [Terms of Service](https://getdex.com/termsofservice): Terms of service (last updated Feb 08, 2022).

## Documentation

- [Get Started](https://getdex.com/docs/get-started): Step-by-step guide to creating an account, importing contacts, and setting up Dex.
- [Dex's Core Features](https://getdex.com/docs/dex-core): Overview of Dex's core feature set.
- [Dex Professional](https://getdex.com/docs/dex-professional): Features included in the Professional plan.

### AI Features

- [Messaging with AI Assist](https://getdex.com/docs/ai/ai-assist): Stay connected with AI-powered message drafting and keep-in-touch reminders.
- [Dex Copilot](https://getdex.com/docs/ai/copilot): AI assistant that helps organize your network, update information, and set reminders.
- [Messaging Dex and Daily Digests](https://getdex.com/docs/ai/messaging-dex): Text Dex like a friend to nurture relationships on the go via SMS.

### Integrations & Sync

- [About Dex Extension](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/aboutdexextension): Overview of the Dex browser extension.
- [LinkedIn Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/linkedin): Connect and sync LinkedIn contacts.
- [Gmail Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/gmail): Connect and sync Gmail conversations.
- [Google Calendar Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/calendar): Connect and sync Google Calendar events.
- [Facebook Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/facebook): Connect and sync Facebook contacts.
- [Instagram Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/instagram): Connect and sync Instagram DMs.
- [Outlook Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/outlook): Connect and sync Outlook email.
- [Superhuman Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/superhuman): Connect Dex with Superhuman email client.
- [Twitter (X) Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/dexextension/twitter): Connect and sync X (Twitter) contacts.
- [Google Sync](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/syncfeatures/sync-google): Sync Gmail and Google Calendar data.
- [LinkedIn Sync](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/syncfeatures/sync-linkedin): Sync LinkedIn connections, messages, and title changes.
- [iMessage Sync](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/syncfeatures/sync-imessage): Sync iMessage conversations.
- [Instagram Sync](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/syncfeatures/sync-instagram): Sync Instagram DM activity.
- [WhatsApp Sync](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/syncfeatures/sync-whatsapp): Sync WhatsApp conversations.
- [Outlook Sync](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/syncfeatures/outlook-sync): Sync Outlook email conversations.
- [Phone Call Sync](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/syncfeatures/sync-phone-calls): Sync phone call history.
- [Two-Way Contact Sync](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/syncfeatures/two-way-sync): Keep device and Dex contacts in sync.
- [Zapier Integration](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/zapier): Automate workflows with Zapier.
- [CC/BCC Email into Dex](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/cc-bcc): Forward emails to Dex via CC or BCC.
- [Mail Merge](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/mail-merge): Send personalized bulk emails.
- [Dex User API](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/api): Programmatic access to contacts, notes, and reminders.

### Importing Contacts

- [Importing from Gmail](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/import/emails): Import contacts from Gmail.
- [Importing from Google Calendar](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/import/calendar): Import contacts from calendar events.
- [Importing from Facebook](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/import/facebook): Import Facebook friends.
- [Importing from Outlook](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/import/outlook): Import Outlook contacts.
- [Importing from a CSV](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/import/csv): Bulk import contacts from a CSV file.
- [Importing Phone Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/integrationsandfeatures/import/phone): Import contacts from your phone.

### Workflows

- [Keep-in-Touch](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/keep-in-touch): Set up keep-in-touch reminders for contacts.
- [Reminders](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/reminders): Create and manage reminders.
- [Follow Up](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/follow-up-features): Follow-up features and workflows.
- [Consolidate your Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/consolidate-your-contacts): Merge duplicates and consolidate contacts.
- [Manage your Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/manage-your-contacts): Edit, tag, group, and manage contacts.
- [Organize your Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/organize-your-contacts): Use groups, tags, and custom fields to organize contacts.
- [New Note Creation](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/new-note-creation): Create and manage notes on contacts.
- [Pre Meeting Brief Emails](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/pre-meeting): Get automated pre-meeting briefs with contact context.
- [Stay Informed](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/stay-informed): Network updates and notifications about your contacts.
- [Card Scanner](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/card-scanner): Scan business cards to create contacts.
- [Exporting Contacts, Notes, and Network Updates](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/export): Export your data from Dex.
- [Account and Billing](https://getdex.com/docs/workflows/manage-your-account): Manage your Dex account and billing.

### API Reference

- [OpenAPI Spec](https://getdex.com/openapi.json): Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.0 specification of the Dex Public API, including rate-limit headers and JSON error envelope.
- [Authentication](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/authentication): How to authenticate requests to the Dex API.
- [Endpoint Reference](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference): Explore all API endpoints grouped by resource.
- [MCP Server](https://mcp.getdex.com/mcp): Model Context Protocol server exposing the Dex API as agent tools. Supports OAuth 2.0 and bearer auth. Manifest: [/.well-known/mcp.json](https://getdex.com/.well-known/mcp.json). OAuth metadata: [/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server](https://getdex.com/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server).

#### Contacts

- [List Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/list-contacts): Retrieve a paginated list of contacts for the authenticated user.
- [Get a Contact](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/get-a-contact): Retrieve a single contact by its unique ID.
- [Count Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/count-contacts): Return the total number of contacts for the authenticated user.
- [Create Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/create-contacts): Create one or more new contacts for the authenticated user.
- [Update a Contact](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/update-a-contact): Update a single contact by its ID.
- [Update Multiple Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/update-multiple-contacts): Update multiple contacts in a single request.
- [Delete a Contact](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/delete-a-contact): Permanently delete a single contact by its ID.
- [Delete Multiple Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/delete-multiple-contacts): Delete multiple contacts in a single request.
- [Filter Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/filter-contacts): Retrieve contacts matching advanced filter criteria.
- [Find Contacts by Email](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/find-contacts-by-email): Look up contacts by one or more email addresses.
- [Search Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/search-contacts): Search contacts by name, email, company, or other text fields.
- [Merge Contacts](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/contacts/merge-contacts): Merge two or more duplicate contacts into a single contact record.

#### Groups

- [List Groups](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/list-groups): Retrieve all groups for the authenticated user.
- [Get a Group](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/get-a-group): Retrieve a single group by its unique ID.
- [Count Groups](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/count-groups): Return the total number of groups for the authenticated user.
- [Create a Group](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/create-a-group): Create a new group for organizing contacts.
- [Update a Group](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/update-a-group): Update a group's name or other properties by its ID.
- [Delete a Group](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/delete-a-group): Permanently delete a group by its ID.
- [List Contacts in a Group](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/list-contacts-in-a-group): Retrieve all contacts that belong to a specific group.
- [Get Contact Counts Per Group](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/get-contact-counts-per-group): Retrieve the number of contacts in each group.
- [Add Contacts to a Group](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/add-contacts-to-a-group): Add one or more contacts to a group by providing an array of contact IDs.
- [Remove Contacts from a Group](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/groups/remove-contacts-from-a-group): Remove one or more contacts from a group.

#### Tags

- [List Tags](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tags/list-tags): Retrieve all tags for the authenticated user.
- [Get a Tag](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tags/get-a-tag): Retrieve a single tag by its unique ID.
- [Count Tags](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tags/count-tags): Return the total number of tags for the authenticated user.
- [Create a Tag](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tags/create-a-tag): Create a new tag with a name and optional color.
- [Bulk Create Tags](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tags/bulk-create-tags): Create multiple tags in a single request.
- [Update a Tag](https://getdex.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tags/update-a-tag): Update a tag's name or color by its ID.
- [Delete a Tag](https://getdex.com/docs

pages.content: Get Started - Dex Guide Search… k Contact Support Dex Dashboard Search… k Dex Product Guide API Updates & Roadmap FAQ Starting with Dex Get Started Dex's Core Features Dex Professional AI Features Messaging Dex and Daily Digests Dex Copilot Messaging with AI Assist MCP Server Dex Skill for AI Agents Use Dex Inside ChatGPT Integrations Zapier Integration Dex User API CC/BCC email into Dex CC/BCC email into Dex Dex Extension About Dex Extension Instagram Integration LinkedIn Integration Facebook Integration Twitter(X) Integration Gmail Integration Outlook Integration Google Calendar Integration Superhuman Integration Import Features Importing from Facebook Importing from Gmail Importing from Outlook Importing from a CSV Importing Phone Contacts Importing from Google Calendar Sync Features LinkedIn Sync Google Sync Two-Way Contact Sync WhatsApp Sync Phone Call Sync iMessage Sync Instagram Sync Outlook Sync Sharing Dex Share Contacts Referral Program Affiliate Program Rolodex - Dex built for teams Dex Workflows Consolidate your Contacts Card Scanner Exporting your Contacts, Notes, and Network Updates Pre Meeting Brief Emails Organize your Contacts Manage your Contacts Stay Informed Follow Up New Note Creation Account and Billing Keep-in-Touch Reminders Share-via Get Started Copy page Learn what Dex is and how to set up your account, install the extension, and download the mobile app. What is Dex? Think of Dex as your personal relationship manager, making it fun and easy to stay connected with the people who matter to you: ✨ Never Lose Track : Leave quick notes about your last meet-up and, with calendar integration, see all your relationship history in one place. 🧠 Be Thoughtful : Add memorable details about your contacts, like their kids' names or how their European vacation went, so you never forget the little things. 🔔 Stay Connected : Set Keep-In-Touch Reminders to reach out regularly, ensuring you stay in touch with family, college friends, former coworkers, and your entire professional network—even when life gets busy. Web App Mobile App Desktop App Ready to start building stronger relationships? Here are some tips to getting started: Creating an account 📚 Joining Dex is a straightforward and effortless process. You can sign up using your Google account, Apple ID, or by completing the registration form. After registration, you'll have access to a 7-day trial to fully experience Dex and see for yourself how it fits your needs. You won't get charged while on trial and canceling it before it ends means you won't pay for any amount. You can cancel the trial any time. If you're on the mobile app, make sure to hop into a desktop and open getdex.com to continue creating the account. Syncing Dex with LinkedIn Do you use LinkedIn and want to import your connections to Dex? Check out our LinkedIn Sync. Installing the Dex Extension is required for this sync to work properly. Syncing Dex with Gmail If you use Gmail and want to track your email exchanges using Dex, take advantage of Gmail Account Sync! Check this guide for more information about sync. Don't forget to import your Gmail contacts. Click here for more information. Install the Dex Extension 🔖 Dex works the most effectively with the Google Chrome extension. The extension allows you to import contacts from Facebook and LinkedIn, import contacts, and access Dex wherever you are. Install Dex for Chrome Extension Click here to download the extension. Open LinkedIn, Facebook, or Instagram and check the icon Learn more about the extension's features here! Download the Mobile App Download the Mobile App and make sure you're always on top of your relationships on the go! Need help setting things up? Click here! Dex's Core Features Meet your relationship wingman — a tour of everything Dex can do. On this page On this page What is Dex? Creating an account 📚 Syncing Dex with LinkedIn Syncing Dex with Gmail Install the Dex Extension 🔖 Download the Mobile App Menu On this page Copyright © 2026
